channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global Geopolitical News Headlines from Tier 1 Sources
channel.item: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚔️ US launches "Project Freedom" to guide ships through Strait of Hormuz as Iran threatens attacks https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-ship-attack-threat-peace-proposal/ President Trump announced the US military would begin escorting stranded vessels through the blocked waterway. Iran warned it would attack any ships accepting US guidance, while the UAE reported an ADNOC tanker was targeted by Iranian drones. US-Iran War 2026-05-04T15:06:00+03:00 CBS News

🇪🇺🛡️ NATO chief Rutte says Europe ready to help clear mines from Strait of Hormuz https://www.irishtimes.com/world/europe/2026/05/04/europe-has-gotten-the-message-from-trump-on-iran-nato-chief-says/ NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte said European governments "got the message" from Trump on the Iran conflict and are prepared to deploy mine hunters and minesweepers in the "next phase" of the operation to restore freedom of navigation. Diplomacy 2026-05-04T15:06:00+03:00 Irish Times

item.title: 🇮🇳🏛️ Modi's BJP wins historic victory in West Bengal state elections
item.description: India's ruling BJP has conquered one of its toughest political frontiers, winning West Bengal after 15 years of TMC rule. The victory marks a major expansion of Modi's political influence into eastern India, with the state's electorate larger than Germany's.

item.title: 🚢🦠 Three dead from suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
item.description: Three people have died and at least three others are ill after a suspected hantavirus outbreak on a Dutch cruise ship off Cape Verde. The WHO confirmed one case and is coordinating medical evacuations while saying the risk to the public is low.

item.title: 🇷🇺🎖️ Russia cancels military hardware display for May 9 Victory Day parade
item.description: Russia's Defense Ministry announced the annual May 9 Victory Day parade will proceed without tanks or missiles for the first time, citing the "current operational situation" and concerns about Ukrainian drone attacks reaching deep into Russian territory.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Prepares Wartime Supply Lines as Defense Minister Cites Paradigm Shift
item.description: Berlin is ramping up military logistics infrastructure in what Defense Minister Pistorius calls a "paradigm shift," but structural and bureaucratic hurdles remain significant for the Bundeswehr's transformation.

channel.item: 🇺🇦 Luxury Moscow Tower Hit by Ukrainian Drone Strike Ahead of Victory Day Parade https://kyivindependent.com/damaged-reported-in-moscow-after-ukrainian-drones-reportedly-hit-residential-building/ A Ukrainian drone strike hit the Mosfilm Tower in an elite Moscow neighborhood approximately 7km from Red Square and 3km from the Russian Defense Ministry, marking one of the deepest strikes into central Moscow's residential core. Ukraine-Russia War 2026-05-04T14:10:00+03:00 Kyiv Independent

🇺🇸 US Withdrawing 5,000 Troops from Germany as Iran War Rift With Europe Widens https://www.defensenews.com/news/pentagon-congress/2026/05/01/us-withdrawing-5000-troops-from-germany-us-officials-say/ The Trump administration is pulling 5,000 troops from Germany as a rift over the Iran war widens between President Trump and European allies. Key Republican chairmen warn the move sends the "wrong signal" to Russia. US Politics 2026-05-04T14:10:00+03:00 Defense News

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel to Buy Extra F-15IA and F-35I Squadrons After High-Tempo Middle East Operations
item.description: After years of high-tempo operations in the Middle East, Israel has locked in plans to further expand its airpower with new F-15IA and F-35I fighter squadrons.

channel.item: 🍽️⛽ US Restaurant Sales Drop as Iran War Pushes Gasoline Prices Higher https://www.reuters.com/world/us/us-restaurant-sales-drop-iran-war-pushes-gasoline-prices-higher-2026-05-04/ Major US restaurant chains including Wingstop and Domino's reported weaker-than-expected sales growth as soaring gasoline prices from the US-Iran conflict forced customers to cut back on discretionary spending. Economy 2026-05-04T14:00:00+03:00 Reuters

🛢️💥 Oil Prices Jump 5% After Report of US Warship Hit by Missiles https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/oil-falls-after-trump-says-us-would-help-free-ships-stranded-strait-hormuz-2026-05-03/ Oil prices surged approximately 5% after Iran's Fars news agency reported an incident with a US warship in the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns over prolonged disruption to the vital oil transit route. Energy 2026-05-04T14:00:00+03:00 Reuters

🇺🇦⚔️ Russian Missile Attack Kills Five in Ukraine's Kharkiv Region https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/russian-missile-attack-kills-five-ukraines-karkhiv-region-officials-say-2026-05-04/ A Russian missile strike on the town of Merefa in Ukraine's northeastern Kharkiv region killed five people and wounded several others, Ukrainian officials said, as fighting continues on multiple fronts. Ukraine-Russia War 2026-05-04T14:00:00+03:00 Reuters

🇦🇺⛪ Australia Begins Hearings Into Bondi Beach Attack and Rising Antisemitism https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/australia-begins-hearings-into-bondi-beach-attack-rising-antisemitism-2026-05-04/ Australia opened public hearings into the December Bondi Beach mass shooting, with Jewish Australians testifying about their experiences of rising domestic antisemitism amid global tensions. Oceania 2026-05-04T14:00:00+03:00 Reuters

🇹🇷📈 Turkish Inflation Surges to 4.18% Monthly as Iran War Fallout Hits Economy https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/turkish-monthly-inflation-surges-418-amid-war-fallout-2026-05-04/ Turkish monthly inflation jumped to 4.18% in April with annual inflation at 32.37%, exceeding forecasts as the Iran conflict tests the central banks policy stance. Economy 2026-05-04T13:05:00+03:00 Reuters

🇺🇸💨 Trump Administration Halts US Wind Farm Projects Citing National Security https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/trump-administration-cites-national-security-halt-us-wind-farm-projects-ft-2026-05-03/ The Trump administration has brought U.S. onshore wind development to a halt, citing national security concerns, the Financial Times reported. Energy 2026-05-04T13:05:00+03:00 Reuters

item.title: 🚢⚠️ US-Led Task Force Begins Effort to Reopen Strait of Hormuz, Ships Told to Reroute
item.description: The US launched an effort to guide stranded ships through the Iran-controlled Strait of Hormuz on Monday, as Iran warned against any interference in the waterway.

channel.item: 🇺🇸🇲🇦 Two US Troops Missing During African Lion Military Exercise in Morocco https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/two-us-troops-missing-during-african-lion-exercise-morocco-africom-says-2026-05-03/ Two US service members participating in joint military exercises were reported missing near Tan Tan in southern Morocco, AFRICOM and Moroccan forces announced. Military 2026-05-04T13:05:00+03:00 Reuters

🤖💰 AI Chipmaker Cerebras Targets $115-$125 Share Price in US IPO https://www.reuters.com/business/ai-chipmaker-cerebras-targets-115-125-share-price-us-ipo-source-says-2026-05-04/ AI chipmaker Cerebras Systems, a rival to Nvidia, is kicking off its IPO roadshow with shares expected to be priced between $115 and $125. Technology 2026-05-04T13:05:00+03:00 Reuters

🇫🇮 Finland raises concerns with Ukraine over drones entering Finnish airspace https://kyivindependent.com/finland-turns-to-ukraine-over-drone-straying-into-finnish-airspace/ Finnish PM Petteri Orpo told Zelensky that drone incursions near the Finnish-Russian border are unacceptable. The incident coincided with an alleged Ukrainian drone strike on Leningrad Oblast. Europe 2026-05-04T12:15:00+03:00 Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices climb as Iran threatens US forces entering Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Brent crude rose 1.5% to $109.80 after Iran warned it would attack US forces approaching the strait. The US launched Project Freedom to escort stranded vessels through the waterway.

item.title: ☢️ War on Iran triggers crisis of trust in nuclear non-proliferation treaty
item.description: The US-Israel campaign against Iran has exposed fundamental flaws in the NPT, diplomats say. Iran remained in compliance with the JCPOA before the US withdrawal, raising questions about the value of nuclear restraint.

channel.item: 🇱🇧⚠️💀 Hezbollah Suffers Heavy Casualties in Lebanon Fighting, Over 2,600 Dead https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/hezbollah-pays-steep-price-battle-reverse-its-fortunes-2026-05-03/ Lebanon's health ministry reports more than 2,600 killed since March 2, with around a fifth being women, children and medics, as Hezbollah battles to reverse its fortunes on the Lebanon front. Middle East 2026-05-04T12:03:00+03:00 Reuters

🇮🇷🇺🇸⚔️ Iran Warns US Navy to Stay Clear of Hormuz as Trump Launches Ship Escort Mission https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/trump-says-us-help-ships-stranded-strait-hormuz-tanker-hit-by-projectiles-2026-05-04/ Iran's military warned US forces not to enter the Strait of Hormuz after President Trump announced 'Project Freedom', a US-led operation to guide stranded ships out of the critical waterway. CENTCOM says 15,000 personnel and over 100 aircraft will support the mission. US-Iran War 2026-05-04T11:03:00+03:00 Reuters

🛢️🚢🇺🇸 US Begins Escorting Stranded Ships Out of Hormuz Under 'Project Freedom' https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-strait-of-hormuz-israel-lebanon-ceasefire/ A US-led task force has begun operations to guide merchant ships stranded for months out of the Strait of Hormuz. The mission comes after a cargo ship was hit by projectiles near the waterway, one of the world's most critical oil transit chokepoints. US-Iran War 2026-05-04T11:03:00+03:00 CBS News

item.title: 🇪🇺🛡️🏛️ NATO Chief: Europeans Have Heard Trump's Message on Defense
item.description: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte said European leaders have 'gotten the message' from Trump over the Iran war and are stepping up defense commitments, following the US announcement of troop withdrawals from Germany.
